name: Physical Double
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>物</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>理</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>り</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>分</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>身</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During your opponent's turn: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; Special Summon 1 "Mirage Token" with the same Level, Type, Attribute, ATK, and DEF as that target. Destroy this Token during the End Phase.
eff: During your opponent's turn: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; Special Summon 1 "Mirage Token" with the same Level, Type, Attribute, ATK, and DEF as that target. Destroy this Token during the End Phase.
